CREATE TABLE DAV_Lock_Test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, resource VARCHAR(255), owner VARCHAR(255), lock_type VARCHAR(1), token VARCHAR(255), expires TIMESTAMP);

INSERT INTO DAV_Lock_Test (id, resource, owner, lock_type, token, expires) VALUES (1, '/DAV/lock_demo/sample.htm', 'user1@example.com', 'S', '1545ce54-3599-11da-8697-8f3efbd86ef2', NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days');

INSERT INTO DAV_Lock_Test (id, resource, owner, lock_type, token, expires) VALUES (2, '/DAV/lock_demo/sample.htm', 'user2@example.com', 'S', '15460590-3599-11da-8697-8f3efbd86ef2', NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days');
SELECT * FROM DAV_Lock_Test WHERE resource = '/DAV/lock_demo/sample.htm' AND owner = 'user1@example.com';
SELECT * FROM DAV_Lock_Test WHERE resource = '/DAV/lock_demo/sample.htm' AND lock_type = 'S';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DAV_Lock_Test WHERE resource = '/DAV/lock_demo/sample.htm' AND lock_type = 'S';
SELECT MAX(expires) FROM DAV_Lock_Test WHERE resource = '/DAV/lock_demo/sample.htm';
UPDATE DAV_Lock_Test SET expires = NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days' WHERE token = '1545ce54-3599-11da-8697-8f3efbd86ef2';
DELETE FROM DAV_Lock_Test WHERE token = '15460590-3599-11da-8697-8f3efbd86ef2' AND owner = 'user2@example.com';
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM DAV_Lock_Test WHERE resource = '/DAV/lock_demo/sample.htm' AND owner = 'user1@example.com' AND lock_type = 'X') AS is_locked;
WITH Locks AS (SELECT * FROM DAV_Lock_Test WHERE resource = '/DAV/lock_demo/sample.htm') SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Locks WHERE lock_type = 'S';
UPDATE DAV_Lock_Test SET lock_type = 'X' WHERE owner = 'user1@example.com' AND resource = '/DAV/lock_demo/sample.htm';

INSERT INTO DAV_Lock_Test (id, resource, owner, lock_type, token, expires) VALUES (3, '/DAV/lock_demo/sample.htm', 'user1@example.com', 'X', '1547251a-3599-11da-8697-8f3efbd86ef2', NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days') ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;
SELECT DISTINCT owner FROM DAV_Lock_Test WHERE resource = '/DAV/lock_demo/sample.htm';
SELECT resource, COUNT(*) FROM DAV_Lock_Test GROUP BY resource HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
